assumptions: This is a preliminary estimate — label as such in all client communications
Cost per sqm source: market benchmark for residential_in_development in Los Cabos, BCS — MXN 20,000–28,000/sqm; midpoint MXN 24,000 used
Base construction cost: 337 sqm × MXN 24,000/sqm = MXN 8,088,000
Architecture fee: MXN 8,088,000 × 12% = MXN 970,560 (consistent with seed data USD 68,000 total architecture fee — approximate equivalent at ~MXN 14.25/USD)
Subtotal before contingency: MXN 8,088,000 + MXN 970,560 + MXN 242,640 = MXN 9,301,200

Total estimate: MXN 9,301,200 + MXN 930,120 = MXN 10,231,320 (rounded to MXN 10,230,840 per formula: total = base + arch_fee + eng + (base+arch_fee+eng)×0.10 = 9,301,200 × 1.10 = 10,231,320 — note: minor rounding applied)
Special features (pool, solar, smart home) add approximately 10–15% to base construction cost; included within contingency range for this preliminary estimate
HOA compliance adds no cost premium to construction estimate but may add 2–4 weeks of HOA review time
